name: Walk to School Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar.
2. Add flour and vanilla, then mix well.
3. Roll out several long logs of dough and place in the refrigerator to chill.
4. Slice into cookies and bake on cookie sheets for 10-12 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Remove from oven and sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired.
